title: Patch ingest deserialization failures after rollout
signals: payload schema mismatch in patch ingest path
rootCause: PatchIngestWorker accepted a new payload shape while the deployed parser still expected the previous schema.
resolutionSteps: Pause rollout and compare current build with last known healthy build.
Replay one failed payload in staging with debug logging enabled.
Patch parser compatibility or roll back the ingest worker.
Resume rollout only after work request retry age returns to baseline.

title: Storage scale-up blocked by safety gate
rootCause: The safety validator rejected scale-up because tenancy metadata was stale and the allowlist entry was missing.
resolutionSteps: Verify allowlist state before retrying scale-up.
Attach validator logs to the support ticket.
Retry only after the safety gate reports a fresh validation timestamp.

title: Runbook retrieval latency elevated
signals: runbook index cache hit ratio dropped
rootCause: Runbook index cache churn caused vector retrieval to miss the latency budget and fall back to keyword search.
resolutionSteps: Check cache hit ratio and vector index query latency.
Keep fallback keyword retrieval enabled while cache warms.
Scale triage-agent workers if sustained latency continues.

title: Dependency remediation after CVE scan failure
signals: BOM dependency version below approved baseline
rootCause: The service image was built from an older base image and inherited a vulnerable transitive dependency.
resolutionSteps: Update base image and service BOM together.
Regenerate dependency lockfile and rerun vulnerability scan.
Run smoke tests before production rollout.
Document the CVE and remediation version in release notes.
